core_mechanism: shape-constrained (log-concavity) maximum-likelihood reconstruction of a latent continuous density from interval-aggregated (grouped/binned) counts, using the concavity-of-the-log convex constraint plus a moment (mean) matching adjustment in place of a tunable smoothing/bandwidth parameter
brief_reason: The abstract recovers the density of ungrouped data from interval occurrence-counts by imposing a log-concave shape constraint with a mean adjustment, giving a bandwidth-free, distribution-free estimator — i.e. constrained optimization under a shape restriction rather than kernel smoothing.
